judge_reason: Both descriptions agree on the graph's title, axis labels, logarithmic scale, and the presence of multiple curves with a legend; Description B adds specific legend details and a caption that Description A omits, but there is no contradiction in the visual content described.
original_image_tags: A technical line graph plotting "Percent in 5-deg sector (%)" on a logarithmic Y-axis against "Angle From Flight Path (deg)" on a linear X-axis. The graph is titled "Atlas IIAS Random-Attitude Failures through 280 sec".
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A line graph titled “Atlas IIAS Random-Attitude Failures through 280 sec” with axes “Percent in 5-deg sector (%)” and “Angle From Flight Path (deg),” showing multiple plotted curves and a legend for breakup q-alpha values (no breakup, 20,000, 10,000, 5,000) and A values (A = 4.00, 4.80, 5.30, 5.55) with caption “Figure 12. Atlas IIAS Simulation Results with B = 500,000.”*
